text.title: React Component Architecture Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: routing not in enum; folder_layout missing primitives; primitive_layer empty; state_strategy missing feature; memoisation_policy=blanket is forbidden.

list.pattern: `<Button>` imports auth check; every feature touches Button to add a use case.
Updating cart count re-renders the entire app; profiler shows 200 components.
Filter UI flickers; double-render on every keystroke.
